overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a tattooed character walking through a futuristic neon-lit city. The character ascends from a shaded underpass into a bright downtown area with towering glass skyscrapers, palm-lined streets, and vibrant digital billboards, then navigates through pedestrian crossings and covered walkways.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered plaza under highway overpass with neon food vendor

agents.ego_description: walking steadily toward the illuminated staircase leading up from the underpass

notable_agents.action: seated in folding chair next to sandbag barricade

entered.detail: food vendor with bright pink neon lighting and menu displays
wide stairs with illuminated orange step edges leading upward
stacked sandbags forming a barrier near the staircase base
massive concrete highway overpass creating heavy shadow overhead

segments.scene_description: The scene opens in a shaded concrete plaza beneath a massive highway overpass. A neon-lit food stall glows pink on the left while sandbag barricades sit to the right. The character walks toward a wide staircase with illuminated steps leading upward into the bright city above.

scene_state.functional_zone: illuminated staircase transition from underpass to street level

events.description: emerging from deep shadow of overpass into bright morning sunlight
reaching top of stairs and entering open urban street with sky visible

agents.ego_description: climbing the illuminated concrete stairs toward the bright cityscape emerging above

entered.detail: tall palm trees becoming visible at the top of the stairs
towering modern glass building with reflective teal-tinted windows

segments.scene_description: The character ascends the glowing staircase, transitioning from the dark underpass into brilliant sunlight. Palm trees and a massive glass skyscraper come into view at the top. The concrete railings frame the climb as the overpass structure recedes to the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy downtown sidewalk lined with palm trees and futuristic architecture

events.description: slight left turn to follow the curving sidewalk path

agents.ego_description: walking along the sunlit sidewalk past palm trees and vibrant digital billboards

notable_agents.action: walking in opposite direction wearing light-colored clothing

entered.detail: large digital billboard displaying WET DREAM in bright pink neon letters
sleek dark-colored cars driving on the multi-lane street
bright orange barriers lining the left edge of the walkway

segments.scene_description: Emerging into the open city, the character walks along a palm-lined sidewalk bathed in morning sunlight. A massive digital billboard advertising WET DREAM dominates the right side, while futuristic cars cruise along the multi-lane street. The glass skyscrapers tower overhead, reflecting the clear blue sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: major intersection with crosswalk and covered pedestrian area under overpass

events.description: crossing the multi-lane street at yellow striped crosswalk with other pedestrians
entering covered walkway beneath overhead structure with colorful neon ceiling lights

agents.ego_description: crossing the busy intersection and continuing under the neon-lit overpass with the crowd

notable_agents.action: walking ahead carrying a large bag over shoulder
group of pedestrians waiting at the crosswalk corner

entered.detail: bold yellow and black striped pedestrian crossing markings
colorful neon light strips in pink and blue on the ceiling of the overpass
multiple large digital screens displaying advertisements on building facades

segments.scene_description: The character navigates a busy downtown intersection, crossing the street alongside other pedestrians. Yellow crosswalk stripes mark the path as cars pass by. Entering the shade of an overpass, the scene shifts to vibrant pink and blue neon lighting overhead, with digital advertisements covering the surrounding buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with illuminated glass walls and futuristic lighting

events.description: entering section with cyan-blue illuminated glass walls on the right side

agents.ego_description: walking through the covered corridor with glowing glass panels and neon accents

entered.detail: large curved glass panels with internal cyan and purple lighting
sleek curved metallic building exterior with clean lines

segments.scene_description: The final segment moves through a modern covered walkway with futuristic architecture. The right side features curved glass walls glowing with cyan and blue internal lighting, while the left shows a sleek metallic building facade. The path continues forward into the distance as the neon-lit cityscape fades behind.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that ascends from a shaded urban underpass into a brilliant, neon-lit futuristic metropolis. It begins in a concrete plaza beneath a massive highway overpass, passing a pink-glowing food stall and sandbag barricades before moving toward a set of illuminated stairs. As the character climbs, the scene transitions from the dark shadows of the overpass into blinding morning sunlight, revealing towering glass skyscrapers and palm trees. The camera then follows the character along a sun-drenched sidewalk dominated by a massive digital billboard and cruising futuristic cars, before crossing a busy intersection marked by yellow stripes. Finally, the environment shifts back into the shade of a covered walkway, where the bright daylight is replaced by cyan and blue internal lighting and sleek metallic facades.
